ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == 関連項目 == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Kawarabuchi Shrine-qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:properly attributed pages]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{神社 |name = 河原淵神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kawarabuchi shrine, Funae.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]][[船江 (伊勢市)|船江]]一丁目10-140 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 56.0 | 経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 52.2 |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = [[式内社]]（小）
{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮}}摂社 |創建 = [[延暦]]23年（[[804年]]）以前 |本殿 = [[神明造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[神嘗祭]]（[[10月20日]]） |神事 = }} {{神社 |name = 船江上社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Funae Kami-no-yashiro.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]船江一丁目10-140 |位置 = {{coord|34|29|56.2|N|136|42|51.9|E|display=inline}} |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = 旧村社 |創建 = [[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]以降 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[9月15日]] |神事 = }} '''Kawarabuchi Shrine''' (河原淵神社, Kawarabuchi Jinja) is a {{ill|sessha|ja|摂末社}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮}} ({{ill|Geku|ja|外宮}}) of {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. This article also covers the former village shrine, '''Funae Kamisha''' (船江上社), located on the same grounds as Kawarabuchi Shrine. == Overview == Kawarabuchi Shrine is located at 1-10-140 Funae, {{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}.Ise Bunka-sha (2008): p.44 The grounds originally belonged to Funae Kamisha, and following historical research within Ise Grand Shrine after the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}}, it was established on the site of Funae Kamisha.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.910 The precinct of Funae Kamisha covers approximately 765 tsubo (about 2,528.9 m2), including an {{ill|outer garden|ja|外苑}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.915 Kawarabuchi Shrine's area is 7 are (about 694.2 m2).Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, p.12 It ranks 12th among the 16 sessha of Geku.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, pp.9, 11-12 Unlike most sessha, which do not have {{ill|saisenbako|ja|賽銭箱}} (offertory boxes), Kawarabuchi Shrine has one. The main shrine is surrounded by a single {{ill|tamagaki|ja|玉垣}} (fence) and features one {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}.Shikinai-sha Research Association (1990): p.376 The {{ill|enshrined deity|ja|deity}} is '''Sawahime no Mikoto''' (澤姫命), revered as a {{ill|guardian deity|ja|守護神}} of water.Gakken Publishing (2013): p.63 There is speculation that the deity might be a mistaken reference to {{ill|Nakisawe|ja|鳴澤女}} in some records. == Funae Kamisha == Funae Kamisha serves as the {{ill|ujigami|ja|氏神}} (guardian deity) for the local area of Funae in Ise. Its official shrine rank under the {{ill|modern shrine ranking system|ja|近代社格制度}} was that of a village shrine. Historically known as "Hachiman-gu" by locals, it is not directly linked to {{ill|Usa Shrine|ja|宇佐神宮}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.909 Initially, the deity was either unknown or associated with {{ill|Hachiman|ja|八幡神}}, but in 1913 (Taisho 2), it was unified with Kawarabuchi Shrine’s deity, Sawahime no Mikoto. The grounds also feature various subordinate shrines. == Oboro Pond == '''Oboro Pond''' (朧ヶ池) lies within the shrine precinct and is believed to be inhabited by a {{ill|dragon god|ja|龍神}}. Historically connected to the {{ill|Miyagawa River|ja|宮川 (三重県)}} and {{ill|Setagawa River|ja|勢田川}}, it influenced the naming of the "Funae" area. == History == While the exact founding date is unknown, Kawarabuchi Shrine appears in the "Toyouke Daijingu Ritual Records" compiled in 804 (Enryaku 23), indicating its ancient origins. It was reconstructed in the Edo period and relocated in 1878 due to flood risks. == Festivals == Annual festivals include the {{ill|Reisai|ja|festival}} on September 15 and a {{ill|Shinji (ritual)|ja|神事}} on March 1. The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == 脚注 == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == 関連項目 == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Kawarabuchi Shrine-qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:subst:MAINSPACE]]

ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == 関連項目 == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Kawarabuchi Shrine-qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]]

revision.text:
{{神社 |name = 河原淵神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kawarabuchi shrine, Funae.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]][[船江 (伊勢市)|船江]]一丁目10-140 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 56.0 | 経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 52.2 |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = [[式内社]]（小）
{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮}}摂社 |創建 = [[延暦]]23年（[[804年]]）以前 |本殿 = [[神明造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[神嘗祭]]（[[10月20日]]） |神事 = }} {{神社 |name = 船江上社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Funae Kami-no-yashiro.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]船江一丁目10-140 |位置 = {{coord|34|29|56.2|N|136|42|51.9|E|display=inline}} |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = 旧村社 |創建 = [[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]以降 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[9月15日]] |神事 = }} '''Kawarabuchi Shrine''' (河原淵神社, Kawarabuchi Jinja) is a {{ill|sessha|ja|摂末社}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮}} ({{ill|Geku|ja|外宮}}) of {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. This article also covers the former village shrine, '''Funae Kamisha''' (船江上社), located on the same grounds as Kawarabuchi Shrine. == Overview == Kawarabuchi Shrine is located at 1-10-140 Funae, {{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}.Ise Bunka-sha (2008): p.44 The grounds originally belonged to Funae Kamisha, and following historical research within Ise Grand Shrine after the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}}, it was established on the site of Funae Kamisha.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.910 The precinct of Funae Kamisha covers approximately 765 tsubo (about 2,528.9 m2), including an {{ill|outer garden|ja|外苑}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.915 Kawarabuchi Shrine's area is 7 are (about 694.2 m2).Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, p.12 It ranks 12th among the 16 sessha of Geku.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, pp.9, 11-12 Unlike most sessha, which do not have {{ill|saisenbako|ja|賽銭箱}} (offertory boxes), Kawarabuchi Shrine has one. The main shrine is surrounded by a single {{ill|tamagaki|ja|玉垣}} (fence) and features one {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}.Shikinai-sha Research Association (1990): p.376 The {{ill|enshrined deity|ja|deity}} is '''Sawahime no Mikoto''' (澤姫命), revered as a {{ill|guardian deity|ja|守護神}} of water.Gakken Publishing (2013): p.63 There is speculation that the deity might be a mistaken reference to {{ill|Nakisawe|ja|鳴澤女}} in some records. == Funae Kamisha == Funae Kamisha serves as the {{ill|ujigami|ja|氏神}} (guardian deity) for the local area of Funae in Ise. Its official shrine rank under the {{ill|modern shrine ranking system|ja|近代社格制度}} was that of a village shrine. Historically known as "Hachiman-gu" by locals, it is not directly linked to {{ill|Usa Shrine|ja|宇佐神宮}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.909 Initially, the deity was either unknown or associated with {{ill|Hachiman|ja|八幡神}}, but in 1913 (Taisho 2), it was unified with Kawarabuchi Shrine’s deity, Sawahime no Mikoto. The grounds also feature various subordinate shrines. == Oboro Pond == '''Oboro Pond''' (朧ヶ池) lies within the shrine precinct and is believed to be inhabited by a {{ill|dragon god|ja|龍神}}. Historically connected to the {{ill|Miyagawa River|ja|宮川 (三重県)}} and {{ill|Setagawa River|ja|勢田川}}, it influenced the naming of the "Funae" area. == History == While the exact founding date is unknown, Kawarabuchi Shrine appears in the "Toyouke Daijingu Ritual Records" compiled in 804 (Enryaku 23), indicating its ancient origins. It was reconstructed in the Edo period and relocated in 1878 due to flood risks. == Festivals == Annual festivals include the {{ill|Reisai|ja|festival}} on September 15 and a {{ill|Shinji (ritual)|ja|神事}} on March 1. The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == 脚注 == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == 関連項目 == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Kawarabuchi Shrine-qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]]

The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == 脚注 == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == 関連項目 == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Kawarabuchi Shrine-qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:Removing this excess]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{神社 |name = 河原淵神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kawarabuchi shrine, Funae.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]][[船江 (伊勢市)|船江]]一丁目10-140 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 56.0 | 経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 52.2 |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = [[式内社]]（小）
{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮}}摂社 |創建 = [[延暦]]23年（[[804年]]）以前 |本殿 = [[神明造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[神嘗祭]]（[[10月20日]]） |神事 = }} {{神社 |name = 船江上社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Funae Kami-no-yashiro.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]船江一丁目10-140 |位置 = {{coord|34|29|56.2|N|136|42|51.9|E|display=inline}} |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = 旧村社 |創建 = [[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]以降 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[9月15日]] |神事 = }} '''Kawarabuchi Shrine''' (河原淵神社, Kawarabuchi Jinja) is a {{ill|sessha|ja|摂末社}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮}} ({{ill|Geku|ja|外宮}}) of {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. This article also covers the former village shrine, '''Funae Kamisha''' (船江上社), located on the same grounds as Kawarabuchi Shrine. == Overview == Kawarabuchi Shrine is located at 1-10-140 Funae, {{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}.Ise Bunka-sha (2008): p.44 The grounds originally belonged to Funae Kamisha, and following historical research within Ise Grand Shrine after the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}}, it was established on the site of Funae Kamisha.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.910 The precinct of Funae Kamisha covers approximately 765 tsubo (about 2,528.9 m2), including an {{ill|outer garden|ja|外苑}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.915 Kawarabuchi Shrine's area is 7 are (about 694.2 m2).Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, p.12 It ranks 12th among the 16 sessha of Geku.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, pp.9, 11-12 Unlike most sessha, which do not have {{ill|saisenbako|ja|賽銭箱}} (offertory boxes), Kawarabuchi Shrine has one. The main shrine is surrounded by a single {{ill|tamagaki|ja|玉垣}} (fence) and features one {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}.Shikinai-sha Research Association (1990): p.376 The {{ill|enshrined deity|ja|deity}} is '''Sawahime no Mikoto''' (澤姫命), revered as a {{ill|guardian deity|ja|守護神}} of water.Gakken Publishing (2013): p.63 There is speculation that the deity might be a mistaken reference to {{ill|Nakisawe|ja|鳴澤女}} in some records. == Funae Kamisha == Funae Kamisha serves as the {{ill|ujigami|ja|氏神}} (guardian deity) for the local area of Funae in Ise. Its official shrine rank under the {{ill|modern shrine ranking system|ja|近代社格制度}} was that of a village shrine. Historically known as "Hachiman-gu" by locals, it is not directly linked to {{ill|Usa Shrine|ja|宇佐神宮}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.909 Initially, the deity was either unknown or associated with {{ill|Hachiman|ja|八幡神}}, but in 1913 (Taisho 2), it was unified with Kawarabuchi Shrine’s deity, Sawahime no Mikoto. The grounds also feature various subordinate shrines. == Oboro Pond == '''Oboro Pond''' (朧ヶ池) lies within the shrine precinct and is believed to be inhabited by a {{ill|dragon god|ja|龍神}}. Historically connected to the {{ill|Miyagawa River|ja|宮川 (三重県)}} and {{ill|Setagawa River|ja|勢田川}}, it influenced the naming of the "Funae" area. == History == While the exact founding date is unknown, Kawarabuchi Shrine appears in the "Toyouke Daijingu Ritual Records" compiled in 804 (Enryaku 23), indicating its ancient origins. It was reconstructed in the Edo period and relocated in 1878 due to flood risks. == Festivals == Annual festivals include the {{ill|Reisai|ja|festival}} on September 15 and a {{ill|Shinji (ritual)|ja|神事}} on March 1. The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == 脚注 == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == 関連項目 == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Kawarabuchi Shrine-qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Removing this excess]]

The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == 脚注 == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == 関連項目 == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Kawarabuchi Shrine-qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "豊受大神宮}}" to "豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}}"
revision.text:
{{神社 |name = 河原淵神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kawarabuchi shrine, Funae.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]][[船江 (伊勢市)|船江]]一丁目10-140 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 56.0 | 経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 52.2 |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = [[式内社]]（小）
{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}}摂社 |創建 = [[延暦]]23年（[[804年]]）以前 |本殿 = [[神明造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[神嘗祭]]（[[10月20日]]） |神事 = }} {{神社 |name = 船江上社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Funae Kami-no-yashiro.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]船江一丁目10-140 |位置 = {{coord|34|29|56.2|N|136|42|51.9|E|display=inline}} |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = 旧村社 |創建 = [[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]以降 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[9月15日]] |神事 = }} '''Kawarabuchi Shrine''' (河原淵神社, Kawarabuchi Jinja) is a {{ill|sessha|ja|摂末社}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}} ({{ill|Geku|ja|外宮}}) of {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. This article also covers the former village shrine, '''Funae Kamisha''' (船江上社), located on the same grounds as Kawarabuchi Shrine. == Overview == Kawarabuchi Shrine is located at 1-10-140 Funae, {{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}.Ise Bunka-sha (2008): p.44 The grounds originally belonged to Funae Kamisha, and following historical research within Ise Grand Shrine after the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}}, it was established on the site of Funae Kamisha.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.910 The precinct of Funae Kamisha covers approximately 765 tsubo (about 2,528.9 m2), including an {{ill|outer garden|ja|外苑}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.915 Kawarabuchi Shrine's area is 7 are (about 694.2 m2).Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, p.12 It ranks 12th among the 16 sessha of Geku.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, pp.9, 11-12 Unlike most sessha, which do not have {{ill|saisenbako|ja|賽銭箱}} (offertory boxes), Kawarabuchi Shrine has one. The main shrine is surrounded by a single {{ill|tamagaki|ja|玉垣}} (fence) and features one {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}.Shikinai-sha Research Association (1990): p.376 The {{ill|enshrined deity|ja|deity}} is '''Sawahime no Mikoto''' (澤姫命), revered as a {{ill|guardian deity|ja|守護神}} of water.Gakken Publishing (2013): p.63 There is speculation that the deity might be a mistaken reference to {{ill|Nakisawe|ja|鳴澤女}} in some records. == Funae Kamisha == Funae Kamisha serves as the {{ill|ujigami|ja|氏神}} (guardian deity) for the local area of Funae in Ise. Its official shrine rank under the {{ill|modern shrine ranking system|ja|近代社格制度}} was that of a village shrine. Historically known as "Hachiman-gu" by locals, it is not directly linked to {{ill|Usa Shrine|ja|宇佐神宮}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.909 Initially, the deity was either unknown or associated with {{ill|Hachiman|ja|八幡神}}, but in 1913 (Taisho 2), it was unified with Kawarabuchi Shrine’s deity, Sawahime no Mikoto. The grounds also feature various subordinate shrines. == Oboro Pond == '''Oboro Pond''' (朧ヶ池) lies within the shrine precinct and is believed to be inhabited by a {{ill|dragon god|ja|龍神}}. Historically connected to the {{ill|Miyagawa River|ja|宮川 (三重県)}} and {{ill|Setagawa River|ja|勢田川}}, it influenced the naming of the "Funae" area. == History == While the exact founding date is unknown, Kawarabuchi Shrine appears in the "Toyouke Daijingu Ritual Records" compiled in 804 (Enryaku 23), indicating its ancient origins. It was reconstructed in the Edo period and relocated in 1878 due to flood risks. == Festivals == Annual festivals include the {{ill|Reisai|ja|festival}} on September 15 and a {{ill|Shinji (ritual)|ja|神事}} on March 1. The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == 脚注 == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == 関連項目 == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Kawarabuchi Shrine-qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]]

The main shrine is surrounded by a single {{ill|tamagaki|ja|玉垣}} (fence) and features one {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}.Shikinai-sha Research Association (1990): p.376 The {{ill|enshrined deity|ja|deity}} is '''Sawahime no Mikoto''' (澤姫命), revered as a {{ill|guardian deity|ja|守護神}} of water.Gakken Publishing (2013): p.63 There is speculation that the deity might be a mistaken reference to {{ill|Nakisawe|ja|鳴澤女}} in some records. == Funae Kamisha == Funae Kamisha serves as the {{ill|ujigami|ja|氏神}} (guardian deity) for the local area of Funae in Ise. Its official shrine rank under the {{ill|modern shrine ranking system|ja|近代社格制度}} was that of a village shrine. Historically known as "Hachiman-gu" by locals, it is not directly linked to {{ill|Usa Shrine|ja|宇佐神宮}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.909 Initially, the deity was either unknown or associated with {{ill|Hachiman|ja|八幡神}}, but in 1913 (Taisho 2), it was unified with Kawarabuchi Shrine’s deity, Sawahime no Mikoto. The grounds also feature various subordinate shrines. == Oboro Pond == '''Oboro Pond''' (朧ヶ池) lies within the shrine precinct and is believed to be inhabited by a {{ill|dragon god|ja|龍神}}. Historically connected to the {{ill|Miyagawa River|ja|宮川 (三重県)}} and {{ill|Setagawa River|ja|勢田川}}, it influenced the naming of the "Funae" area. == History == While the exact founding date is unknown, Kawarabuchi Shrine appears in the "Toyouke Daijingu Ritual Records" compiled in 804 (Enryaku 23), indicating its ancient origins. It was reconstructed in the Edo period and relocated in 1878 due to flood risks. == Festivals == Annual festivals include the {{ill|Reisai|ja|festival}} on September 15 and a {{ill|Shinji (ritual)|ja|神事}} on March 1. The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == 脚注 == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Kawarabuchi Shrine-qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]]

{{神社 |name = 河原淵神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kawarabuchi shrine, Funae.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]][[船江 (伊勢市)|船江]]一丁目10-140 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 56.0 | 経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 52.2 |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = [[式内社]]（小）
{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}}摂社 |創建 = [[延暦]]23年（[[804年]]）以前 |本殿 = [[神明造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[神嘗祭]]（[[10月20日]]） |神事 = }} {{神社 |name = 船江上社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Funae Kami-no-yashiro.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]船江一丁目10-140 |位置 = {{coord|34|29|56.2|N|136|42|51.9|E|display=inline}} |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = 旧村社 |創建 = [[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]以降 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[9月15日]] |神事 = }} '''Kawarabuchi Shrine''' (河原淵神社, Kawarabuchi Jinja) is a {{ill|sessha|ja|摂末社}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}} ({{ill|Geku|ja|外宮}}) of {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. This article also covers the former village shrine, '''Funae Kamisha''' (船江上社), located on the same grounds as Kawarabuchi Shrine. == Overview == Kawarabuchi Shrine is located at 1-10-140 Funae, {{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}.Ise Bunka-sha (2008): p.44 The grounds originally belonged to Funae Kamisha, and following historical research within Ise Grand Shrine after the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}}, it was established on the site of Funae Kamisha.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.910 The precinct of Funae Kamisha covers approximately 765 tsubo (about 2,528.9 m2), including an {{ill|outer garden|ja|外苑}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.915 Kawarabuchi Shrine's area is 7 are (about 694.2 m2).Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, p.12 It ranks 12th among the 16 sessha of Geku.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, pp.9, 11-12 Unlike most sessha, which do not have {{ill|saisenbako|ja|賽銭箱}} (offertory boxes), Kawarabuchi Shrine has one. The grounds also feature various subordinate shrines. == Oboro Pond == '''Oboro Pond''' (朧ヶ池) lies within the shrine precinct and is believed to be inhabited by a {{ill|dragon god|ja|龍神}}. It was reconstructed in the Edo period and relocated in 1878 due to flood risks. == Festivals == Annual festivals include the {{ill|Reisai|ja|festival}} on September 15 and a {{ill|Shinji (ritual)|ja|神事}} on March 1. The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == 脚注 == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. {{神社 |name = 河原淵神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kawarabuchi shrine, Funae.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]][[船江 (伊勢市)|船江]]一丁目10-140 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 56.0 | 経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 52.2 |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = [[式内社]]（小）
{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}}摂社 |創建 = [[延暦]]23年（[[804年]]）以前 |本殿 = [[神明造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[神嘗祭]]（[[10月20日]]） |神事 = }} {{神社 |name = 船江上社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Funae Kami-no-yashiro.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]船江一丁目10-140 |位置 = {{coord|34|29|56.2|N|136|42|51.9|E|display=inline}} |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = 旧村社 |創建 = [[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]以降 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[9月15日]] |神事 = }} '''Kawarabuchi Shrine''' (河原淵神社, Kawarabuchi Jinja) is a {{ill|sessha|ja|摂末社}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}} ({{ill|Geku|ja|外宮}}) of {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. This article also covers the former village shrine, '''Funae Kamisha''' (船江上社), located on the same grounds as Kawarabuchi Shrine. == Overview == Kawarabuchi Shrine is located at 1-10-140 Funae, {{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}.Ise Bunka-sha (2008): p.44 The grounds originally belonged to Funae Kamisha, and following historical research within Ise Grand Shrine after the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}}, it was established on the site of Funae Kamisha.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.910 The precinct of Funae Kamisha covers approximately 765 tsubo (about 2,528.9 m2), including an {{ill|outer garden|ja|外苑}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.915 Kawarabuchi Shrine's area is 7 are (about 694.2 m2).Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, p.12 It ranks 12th among the 16 sessha of Geku.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, pp.9, 11-12 Unlike most sessha, which do not have {{ill|saisenbako|ja|賽銭箱}} (offertory boxes), Kawarabuchi Shrine has one. The main shrine is surrounded by a single {{ill|tamagaki|ja|玉垣}} (fence) and features one {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}.Shikinai-sha Research Association (1990): p.376 The {{ill|enshrined deity|ja|deity}} is '''Sawahime no Mikoto''' (澤姫命), revered as a {{ill|guardian deity|ja|守護神}} of water.Gakken Publishing (2013): p.63 There is speculation that the deity might be a mistaken reference to {{ill|Nakisawe|ja|鳴澤女}} in some records. == Funae Kamisha == Funae Kamisha serves as the {{ill|ujigami|ja|氏神}} (guardian deity) for the local area of Funae in Ise. Its official shrine rank under the {{ill|modern shrine ranking system|ja|近代社格制度}} was that of a village shrine. Historically known as "Hachiman-gu" by locals, it is not directly linked to {{ill|Usa Shrine|ja|宇佐神宮}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.909 Initially, the deity was either unknown or associated with {{ill|Hachiman|ja|八幡神}}, but in 1913 (Taisho 2), it was unified with Kawarabuchi Shrine’s deity, Sawahime no Mikoto. The grounds also feature various subordinate shrines. == Oboro Pond == '''Oboro Pond''' (朧ヶ池) lies within the shrine precinct and is believed to be inhabited by a {{ill|dragon god|ja|龍神}}. Historically connected to the {{ill|Miyagawa River|ja|宮川 (三重県)}} and {{ill|Setagawa River|ja|勢田川}}, it influenced the naming of the "Funae" area. == History == While the exact founding date is unknown, Kawarabuchi Shrine appears in the "Toyouke Daijingu Ritual Records" compiled in 804 (Enryaku 23), indicating its ancient origins. It was reconstructed in the Edo period and relocated in 1878 due to flood risks. == Festivals == Annual festivals include the {{ill|Reisai|ja|festival}} on September 15 and a {{ill|Shinji (ritual)|ja|神事}} on March 1. The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == 脚注 == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category: :qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:Ugoodbye $1]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Kawarabuchi Shrine-qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]]

ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category: :qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:Ugoodbye $1]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Kawarabuchi Shrine-qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Ugoodbye $1]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{神社 |name = 河原淵神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kawarabuchi shrine, Funae.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]][[船江 (伊勢市)|船江]]一丁目10-140 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 56.0 | 経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 52.2 |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = [[式内社]]（小）
{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}}摂社 |創建 = [[延暦]]23年（[[804年]]）以前 |本殿 = [[神明造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[神嘗祭]]（[[10月20日]]） |神事 = }} {{神社 |name = 船江上社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Funae Kami-no-yashiro.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]船江一丁目10-140 |位置 = {{coord|34|29|56.2|N|136|42|51.9|E|display=inline}} |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = 旧村社 |創建 = [[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]以降 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[9月15日]] |神事 = }} '''Kawarabuchi Shrine''' (河原淵神社, Kawarabuchi Jinja) is a {{ill|sessha|ja|摂末社}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}} ({{ill|Geku|ja|外宮}}) of {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. This article also covers the former village shrine, '''Funae Kamisha''' (船江上社), located on the same grounds as Kawarabuchi Shrine. == Overview == Kawarabuchi Shrine is located at 1-10-140 Funae, {{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}.Ise Bunka-sha (2008): p.44 The grounds originally belonged to Funae Kamisha, and following historical research within Ise Grand Shrine after the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}}, it was established on the site of Funae Kamisha.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.910 The precinct of Funae Kamisha covers approximately 765 tsubo (about 2,528.9 m2), including an {{ill|outer garden|ja|外苑}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.915 Kawarabuchi Shrine's area is 7 are (about 694.2 m2).Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, p.12 It ranks 12th among the 16 sessha of Geku.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, pp.9, 11-12 Unlike most sessha, which do not have {{ill|saisenbako|ja|賽銭箱}} (offertory boxes), Kawarabuchi Shrine has one. The main shrine is surrounded by a single {{ill|tamagaki|ja|玉垣}} (fence) and features one {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}.Shikinai-sha Research Association (1990): p.376 The {{ill|enshrined deity|ja|deity}} is '''Sawahime no Mikoto''' (澤姫命), revered as a {{ill|guardian deity|ja|守護神}} of water.Gakken Publishing (2013): p.63 There is speculation that the deity might be a mistaken reference to {{ill|Nakisawe|ja|鳴澤女}} in some records. == Funae Kamisha == Funae Kamisha serves as the {{ill|ujigami|ja|氏神}} (guardian deity) for the local area of Funae in Ise. Its official shrine rank under the {{ill|modern shrine ranking system|ja|近代社格制度}} was that of a village shrine. Historically known as "Hachiman-gu" by locals, it is not directly linked to {{ill|Usa Shrine|ja|宇佐神宮}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.909 Initially, the deity was either unknown or associated with {{ill|Hachiman|ja|八幡神}}, but in 1913 (Taisho 2), it was unified with Kawarabuchi Shrine’s deity, Sawahime no Mikoto. The grounds also feature various subordinate shrines. == Oboro Pond == '''Oboro Pond''' (朧ヶ池) lies within the shrine precinct and is believed to be inhabited by a {{ill|dragon god|ja|龍神}}. Historically connected to the {{ill|Miyagawa River|ja|宮川 (三重県)}} and {{ill|Setagawa River|ja|勢田川}}, it influenced the naming of the "Funae" area. == History == While the exact founding date is unknown, Kawarabuchi Shrine appears in the "Toyouke Daijingu Ritual Records" compiled in 804 (Enryaku 23), indicating its ancient origins. It was reconstructed in the Edo period and relocated in 1878 due to flood risks. == Festivals == Annual festivals include the {{ill|Reisai|ja|festival}} on September 15 and a {{ill|Shinji (ritual)|ja|神事}} on March 1. The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == 脚注 == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category: :qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Kawarabuchi Shrine-qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

Historically connected to the {{ill|Miyagawa River|ja|宮川 (三重県)}} and {{ill|Setagawa River|ja|勢田川}}, it influenced the naming of the "Funae" area. == History == While the exact founding date is unknown, Kawarabuchi Shrine appears in the "Toyouke Daijingu Ritual Records" compiled in 804 (Enryaku 23), indicating its ancient origins. It was reconstructed in the Edo period and relocated in 1878 due to flood risks. == Festivals == Annual festivals include the {{ill|Reisai|ja|festival}} on September 15 and a {{ill|Shinji (ritual)|ja|神事}} on March 1. The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == 脚注 == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]] [[Category:河原淵神社]] [[Category:qq-Kawarabuchi Shrine-qq]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

revision.text:
{{神社 |name = 河原淵神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kawarabuchi shrine, Funae.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]][[船江 (伊勢市)|船江]]一丁目10-140 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 56.0 | 経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 52.2 |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = [[式内社]]（小）
{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}}摂社 |創建 = [[延暦]]23年（[[804年]]）以前 |本殿 = [[神明造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[神嘗祭]]（[[10月20日]]） |神事 = }} {{神社 |name = 船江上社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Funae Kami-no-yashiro.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]船江一丁目10-140 |位置 = {{coord|34|29|56.2|N|136|42|51.9|E|display=inline}} |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = 旧村社 |創建 = [[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]以降 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[9月15日]] |神事 = }} '''Kawarabuchi Shrine''' (河原淵神社, Kawarabuchi Jinja) is a {{ill|sessha|ja|摂末社}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}} ({{ill|Geku|ja|外宮}}) of {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. This article also covers the former village shrine, '''Funae Kamisha''' (船江上社), located on the same grounds as Kawarabuchi Shrine. == Overview == Kawarabuchi Shrine is located at 1-10-140 Funae, {{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}.Ise Bunka-sha (2008): p.44 The grounds originally belonged to Funae Kamisha, and following historical research within Ise Grand Shrine after the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}}, it was established on the site of Funae Kamisha.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.910 The precinct of Funae Kamisha covers approximately 765 tsubo (about 2,528.9 m2), including an {{ill|outer garden|ja|外苑}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.915 Kawarabuchi Shrine's area is 7 are (about 694.2 m2).Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, p.12 It ranks 12th among the 16 sessha of Geku.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, pp.9, 11-12 Unlike most sessha, which do not have {{ill|saisenbako|ja|賽銭箱}} (offertory boxes), Kawarabuchi Shrine has one. The main shrine is surrounded by a single {{ill|tamagaki|ja|玉垣}} (fence) and features one {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}.Shikinai-sha Research Association (1990): p.376 The {{ill|enshrined deity|ja|deity}} is '''Sawahime no Mikoto''' (澤姫命), revered as a {{ill|guardian deity|ja|守護神}} of water.Gakken Publishing (2013): p.63 There is speculation that the deity might be a mistaken reference to {{ill|Nakisawe|ja|鳴澤女}} in some records. == Funae Kamisha == Funae Kamisha serves as the {{ill|ujigami|ja|氏神}} (guardian deity) for the local area of Funae in Ise. Its official shrine rank under the {{ill|modern shrine ranking system|ja|近代社格制度}} was that of a village shrine. Historically known as "Hachiman-gu" by locals, it is not directly linked to {{ill|Usa Shrine|ja|宇佐神宮}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.909 Initially, the deity was either unknown or associated with {{ill|Hachiman|ja|八幡神}}, but in 1913 (Taisho 2), it was unified with Kawarabuchi Shrine’s deity, Sawahime no Mikoto. The grounds also feature various subordinate shrines. == Oboro Pond == '''Oboro Pond''' (朧ヶ池) lies within the shrine precinct and is believed to be inhabited by a {{ill|dragon god|ja|龍神}}. Historically connected to the {{ill|Miyagawa River|ja|宮川 (三重県)}} and {{ill|Setagawa River|ja|勢田川}}, it influenced the naming of the "Funae" area. == History == While the exact founding date is unknown, Kawarabuchi Shrine appears in the "Toyouke Daijingu Ritual Records" compiled in 804 (Enryaku 23), indicating its ancient origins. It was reconstructed in the Edo period and relocated in 1878 due to flood risks. == Festivals == Annual festivals include the {{ill|Reisai|ja|festival}} on September 15 and a {{ill|Shinji (ritual)|ja|神事}} on March 1. The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == 脚注 == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == 外部リンク == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]] [[Category:河原淵神社]] [[Category:qq-Kawarabuchi Shrine-->[[Category:qq deprecated close]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}}摂社 |創建 = [[延暦]]23年（[[804年]]）以前 |本殿 = [[神明造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[神嘗祭]]（[[10月20日]]） |神事 = }} {{神社 |name = 船江上社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Funae Kami-no-yashiro.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]船江一丁目10-140 |位置 = {{coord|34|29|56.2|N|136|42|51.9|E|display=inline}} |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = 旧村社 |創建 = [[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]以降 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[9月15日]] |神事 = }} '''Kawarabuchi Shrine''' (河原淵神社, Kawarabuchi Jinja) is a {{ill|sessha|ja|摂末社}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}} ({{ill|Geku|ja|外宮}}) of {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. This article also covers the former village shrine, '''Funae Kamisha''' (船江上社), located on the same grounds as Kawarabuchi Shrine. == Overview == Kawarabuchi Shrine is located at 1-10-140 Funae, {{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}.Ise Bunka-sha (2008): p.44 The grounds originally belonged to Funae Kamisha, and following historical research within Ise Grand Shrine after the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}}, it was established on the site of Funae Kamisha.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.910 The precinct of Funae Kamisha covers approximately 765 tsubo (about 2,528.9 m2), including an {{ill|outer garden|ja|外苑}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.915 Kawarabuchi Shrine's area is 7 are (about 694.2 m2).Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, p.12 It ranks 12th among the 16 sessha of Geku.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, pp.9, 11-12 Unlike most sessha, which do not have {{ill|saisenbako|ja|賽銭箱}} (offertory boxes), Kawarabuchi Shrine has one. The main shrine is surrounded by a single {{ill|tamagaki|ja|玉垣}} (fence) and features one {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}.Shikinai-sha Research Association (1990): p.376 The {{ill|enshrined deity|ja|deity}} is '''Sawahime no Mikoto''' (澤姫命), revered as a {{ill|guardian deity|ja|守護神}} of water.Gakken Publishing (2013): p.63 There is speculation that the deity might be a mistaken reference to {{ill|Nakisawe|ja|鳴澤女}} in some records. == Funae Kamisha == Funae Kamisha serves as the {{ill|ujigami|ja|氏神}} (guardian deity) for the local area of Funae in Ise. Its official shrine rank under the {{ill|modern shrine ranking system|ja|近代社格制度}} was that of a village shrine. Historically known as "Hachiman-gu" by locals, it is not directly linked to {{ill|Usa Shrine|ja|宇佐神宮}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.909 Initially, the deity was either unknown or associated with {{ill|Hachiman|ja|八幡神}}, but in 1913 (Taisho 2), it was unified with Kawarabuchi Shrine’s deity, Sawahime no Mikoto. The grounds also feature various subordinate shrines. == Oboro Pond == '''Oboro Pond''' (朧ヶ池) lies within the shrine precinct and is believed to be inhabited by a {{ill|dragon god|ja|龍神}}. Historically connected to the {{ill|Miyagawa River|ja|宮川 (三重県)}} and {{ill|Setagawa River|ja|勢田川}}, it influenced the naming of the "Funae" area. == History == While the exact founding date is unknown, Kawarabuchi Shrine appears in the "Toyouke Daijingu Ritual Records" compiled in 804 (Enryaku 23), indicating its ancient origins. It was reconstructed in the Edo period and relocated in 1878 due to flood risks. == Festivals == Annual festivals include the {{ill|Reisai|ja|festival}} on September 15 and a {{ill|Shinji (ritual)|ja|神事}} on March 1. The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == 脚注 == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == External Links == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]][[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]] [[Category:河原淵神社]] [[Category:qq deprecated open]][[Category:qq deprecated close]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

revision.text:
{{神社 |name = 河原淵神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kawarabuchi shrine, Funae.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]][[船江 (伊勢市)|船江]]一丁目10-140 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 56.0 | 経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 52.2 |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = [[式内社]]（小）
{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}}摂社 |創建 = [[延暦]]23年（[[804]]）以前 |本殿 = [[神明造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[神嘗祭]]（[[10月20日]]） |神事 = }} {{神社 |name = 船江上社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Funae Kami-no-yashiro.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]船江一丁目10-140 |位置 = {{coord|34|29|56.2|N|136|42|51.9|E|display=inline}} |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = 旧村社 |創建 = [[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]以降 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[9月15日]] |神事 = }} '''Kawarabuchi Shrine''' (河原淵神社, Kawarabuchi Jinja) is a {{ill|sessha|ja|摂末社}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}} ({{ill|Geku|ja|外宮}}) of {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. This article also covers the former village shrine, '''Funae Kamisha''' (船江上社), located on the same grounds as Kawarabuchi Shrine. == Overview == Kawarabuchi Shrine is located at 1-10-140 Funae, {{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}.Ise Bunka-sha (2008): p.44 The grounds originally belonged to Funae Kamisha, and following historical research within Ise Grand Shrine after the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}}, it was established on the site of Funae Kamisha.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.910 The precinct of Funae Kamisha covers approximately 765 tsubo (about 2,528.9 m2), including an {{ill|outer garden|ja|外苑}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.915 Kawarabuchi Shrine's area is 7 are (about 694.2 m2).Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, p.12 It ranks 12th among the 16 sessha of Geku.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, pp.9, 11-12 Unlike most sessha, which do not have {{ill|saisenbako|ja|賽銭箱}} (offertory boxes), Kawarabuchi Shrine has one. The main shrine is surrounded by a single {{ill|tamagaki|ja|玉垣}} (fence) and features one {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}.Shikinai-sha Research Association (1990): p.376 The {{ill|enshrined deity|ja|deity}} is '''Sawahime no Mikoto''' (澤姫命), revered as a {{ill|guardian deity|ja|守護神}} of water.Gakken Publishing (2013): p.63 There is speculation that the deity might be a mistaken reference to {{ill|Nakisawe|ja|鳴澤女}} in some records. == Funae Kamisha == Funae Kamisha serves as the {{ill|ujigami|ja|氏神}} (guardian deity) for the local area of Funae in Ise. Its official shrine rank under the {{ill|modern shrine ranking system|ja|近代社格制度}} was that of a village shrine. Historically known as "Hachiman-gu" by locals, it is not directly linked to {{ill|Usa Shrine|ja|宇佐神宮}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.909 Initially, the deity was either unknown or associated with {{ill|Hachiman|ja|八幡神}}, but in 1913 (Taisho 2), it was unified with Kawarabuchi Shrine’s deity, Sawahime no Mikoto. The grounds also feature various subordinate shrines. == Oboro Pond == '''Oboro Pond''' (朧ヶ池) lies within the shrine precinct and is believed to be inhabited by a {{ill|dragon god|ja|龍神}}. Historically connected to the {{ill|Miyagawa River|ja|宮川 (三重県)}} and {{ill|Setagawa River|ja|勢田川}}, it influenced the naming of the "Funae" area. == History == While the exact founding date is unknown, Kawarabuchi Shrine appears in the "Toyouke Daijingu Ritual Records" compiled in 804 (Enryaku 23), indicating its ancient origins. It was reconstructed in the Edo period and relocated in 1878 due to flood risks. == Festivals == Annual festivals include the {{ill|Reisai|ja|festival}} on September 15 and a {{ill|Shinji (ritual)|ja|神事}} on March 1. The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == 脚注 == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == External Links == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]] [[Category:河原淵神社]] [[Category:qq deprecated open]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == External Links == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]] [[Category:河原淵神社]] [[Category:qq deprecated open]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

revision.text:
{{神社 |name = 河原淵神社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kawarabuchi shrine, Funae.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]][[船江 (伊勢市)|船江]]一丁目10-140 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 29 | 緯度秒 = 56.0 | 経度度 = 136 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 52.2 |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = [[式内社]]（小）
{{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}}摂社 |創建 = [[延暦]]23年（[[804]]）以前 |本殿 = [[神明造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[神嘗祭]]（[[10月20日]]） |神事 = }} {{神社 |name = 船江上社 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Funae Kami-no-yashiro.jpg|250px]] |所在地 = [[三重県]][[伊勢市]]船江一丁目10-140 |位置 = {{coord|34|29|56.2|N|136|42|51.9|E|display=inline}} |deity = 澤姫命 |社格 = 旧村社 |創建 = [[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]以降 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |festival = [[9月15日]] |神事 = }} '''Kawarabuchi Shrine''' (河原淵神社, Kawarabuchi Jinja) is a {{ill|sessha|ja|摂末社}} of {{ill|Toyouke Daijingu|ja|豊受大神宮|1=Toyouke Daijingu|2=ja|3=豊受大神宮|4=zh|5=豐受大神宮}} ({{ill|Geku|ja|外宮}}) of {{ill|Ise Grand Shrine|ja|伊勢神宮}}. This article also covers the former village shrine, '''Funae Kamisha''' (船江上社), located on the same grounds as Kawarabuchi Shrine. == Overview == Kawarabuchi Shrine is located at 1-10-140 Funae, {{ill|Ise|ja|伊勢市}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}.Ise Bunka-sha (2008): p.44 The grounds originally belonged to Funae Kamisha, and following historical research within Ise Grand Shrine after the {{ill|Meiji Restoration|ja|明治維新}}, it was established on the site of Funae Kamisha.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.910 The precinct of Funae Kamisha covers approximately 765 tsubo (about 2,528.9 m2), including an {{ill|outer garden|ja|外苑}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.915 Kawarabuchi Shrine's area is 7 are (about 694.2 m2).Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, p.12 It ranks 12th among the 16 sessha of Geku.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.1, pp.9, 11-12 Unlike most sessha, which do not have {{ill|saisenbako|ja|賽銭箱}} (offertory boxes), Kawarabuchi Shrine has one. The main shrine is surrounded by a single {{ill|tamagaki|ja|玉垣}} (fence) and features one {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}.Shikinai-sha Research Association (1990): p.376 The {{ill|enshrined deity|ja|deity}} is '''Sawahime no Mikoto''' (澤姫命), revered as a {{ill|guardian deity|ja|守護神}} of water.Gakken Publishing (2013): p.63 There is speculation that the deity might be a mistaken reference to {{ill|Nakisawe|ja|鳴澤女}} in some records. == Funae Kamisha == Funae Kamisha serves as the {{ill|ujigami|ja|氏神}} (guardian deity) for the local area of Funae in Ise. Its official shrine rank under the {{ill|modern shrine ranking system|ja|近代社格制度}} was that of a village shrine. Historically known as "Hachiman-gu" by locals, it is not directly linked to {{ill|Usa Shrine|ja|宇佐神宮}}.Ujiyamada City Office (1929): vol.2, p.909 Initially, the deity was either unknown or associated with {{ill|Hachiman|ja|八幡神}}, but in 1913 (Taisho 2), it was unified with Kawarabuchi Shrine’s deity, Sawahime no Mikoto. The grounds also feature various subordinate shrines. == Oboro Pond == '''Oboro Pond''' (朧ヶ池) lies within the shrine precinct and is believed to be inhabited by a {{ill|dragon god|ja|龍神}}. Historically connected to the {{ill|Miyagawa River|ja|宮川 (三重県)}} and {{ill|Setagawa River|ja|勢田川}}, it influenced the naming of the "Funae" area. == History == While the exact founding date is unknown, Kawarabuchi Shrine appears in the "Toyouke Daijingu Ritual Records" compiled in 804 (Enryaku 23), indicating its ancient origins. It was reconstructed in the Edo period and relocated in 1878 due to flood risks. == Festivals == Annual festivals include the {{ill|Reisai|ja|festival}} on September 15 and a {{ill|Shinji (ritual)|ja|神事}} on March 1. The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == 脚注 == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == External Links == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]] [[Category:河原淵神社]] [[Category:qq deprecated open]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]

It was reconstructed in the Edo period and relocated in 1878 due to flood risks. == Festivals == Annual festivals include the {{ill|Reisai|ja|festival}} on September 15 and a {{ill|Shinji (ritual)|ja|神事}} on March 1. The "Fuchi Festival" involves {{ill|kagura|ja|神楽}} performances and ritual offerings floated on Oboro Pond. == Access == * Public transport: From {{ill|Ise Station|ja|伊勢市駅}}, take a {{ill|Mie Kotsu|ja|三重交通}} bus to "Asahidori" stop, then a 3-minute walk. * By car: 8 minutes north from {{ill|Ise Nishi IC|ja|伊勢西インターチェンジ}} on {{ill|Mie Prefectural Route 32|ja|三重県道32号伊勢磯部線}}. == References == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|List of 125 Shrines of Ise|ja|神宮125社の一覧}} * {{ill|List of Shikinai shrines in Ise Province|ja|伊勢国の式内社一覧}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Ise]] [[Category:Sessha of Ise Grand Shrine]] [[ja:河原淵神社]] == References == ;出典 {{Reflist|2}} == 参考文献 == * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 上巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年1月20日、862p. * 宇治山田市役所 編『宇治山田市史 下巻』宇治山田市役所、昭和4年3月5日、1690p. * [[学研パブリッシング]]『伊勢神宮に行こう』Gakken Mook神社紀行セレクションvol.1、[[薗田稔]]監修、学研マーケティング、2013年7月4日、82p. ISBN 978-4-05-610047-1 * 式内社研究会 編『式内社調査報告 第六巻 東海道1』[[皇學館大学]]出版部、平成2年2月28日、690p. ISBN 4-87644-080-8 * 『お伊勢さん125社めぐり』別冊『伊勢人』、[[伊勢文化舎]]、平成20年12月23日、151p. ISBN 978-4-900759-37-4 == See Also == * [[伊勢国の式内社一覧]] * [[川原神社 (伊勢市)]] - 河原淵神社が川原神社の旧社地だったとする説がある。 == External Links == * [http://www.jingukaikan.jp/125mairi/m04/0404.html 河原淵神社（かわらぶちじんじゃ）] - 財団法人伊勢神宮崇敬会 {{125 Shrines of Ise}} {{神道 横}} {{125 Shrines of Ise|かわらふちしんしや}} [[Category:伊勢市の神社]] [[Category:125 Shrines of Ise]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]] [[Category:河原淵神社]] [[Category:qq deprecated open]] [[Category:河原淵神社]][[ja:河原淵神社]][[Category:伊勢国の式内社]] [[Category:摂末社]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]][[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:bump 1-26]] [[Category:category refresh]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:河原淵神社]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kawarabuchi Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]]
